reviews.review_title: Very enjoyable and worth the money!
reviews.review_description:
I have to say, I was quite surprised when a $1.00 purchase turned out to be a really enjoyable and well-made game.  I have not finished the game yet but have played through several missions and have had a lot of fun doing so.  

In many ways it plays like The Walking Dead Saints and Sinners which is a good thing and a bad thing.  The good being that the way you handle equipment and storage of items is almost identical.  The bad being that melee weapons are just as unwieldy and cumbersome to use.  So just like in Saints and Sinners, when using two handed melee weapons be prepared for them to wave all over the place.  They work, but are wonky in the process.

Now regarding the gunplay, it is quite good.  Guns handle well which is make or break in a game like this.  So far, I have two firearms and the SMG is a lot of fun to use and handles very well.  I love mowing down a hoard of zombies with it.

The graphics are low in detail, but what do you expect at this price.  They are serviceable and do a fine job of displaying the environment around you.  I find them to be enjoyable and charming to look at.

I have enjoyed the locales I have been to so far.  It's been a lot of fun exploring the different buildings looking for schematics to build new gear (just like in Saints and Sinners).  I've been really pleased with what the designer of the game has done to give a sense of life to each location.  The environments looked lived in despite being of such low detail.  Its a low poly world for low poly people and the designer did a good job fleshing out each location.  I really enjoyed exploring each one.

The biggest gripe I have is regarding the dialogue (the story is enjoyable and is delivered quite well by the voice actors).  The problem I have with it is the swearing.  I just wish there was a way to turn that off.  It's just a bit much for my taste.

All in all, this is a fun and enjoyable game.  I definitely recommend checking it out!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for this review! I’m glad you enjoyed it, and I hope the other tracks will provide a similar experience. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact me. support@gabrealitygames.com

reviews.review_description:
EDIT: The game still crashes, but it's possible that it's a headset issue. Thanks to the developer for his help and quick response in guiding me through some of the game's pitfalls. Even though zombie shooters aren't my typical genre and I bought the game because it was on sale, I was pleasantly surprised and I'm enjoying it. It's not just another zombie shooting game, but it has a story, you have to collect materials to craft items and solve various puzzles. The only minor downside is that you have to go through the entire level without the option to save. But overall, I rate it as one of the best zombie games.-------

The game would be great, but it's unplayable due to repeated crashes. And there are other problems. There's no way to adjust the movement speed, you can't approach things slowly and smoothly, sometimes it's hard to pick up objects from the ground, you have to bend down to get to them. A hint would help with some puzzles, I couldn't figure out how to find the code in the bunker by the second door. To open it, I entered numbers from 001 to 999 one by one. When I was walking through the room with the mannequins, the game crashed and I had to restart it. The codes changed, so I had to repeat the whole search process. Then I got to the fifth room and the game crashed again. More checkpoints would be needed so that you don't have to start over from the beginning every time. If these problems are fixed, I'll give the game a full score.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the review! I'm glad I could help and that overall you like the game, I'll consider your suggestions and incorporate what I can into the game. If there's anything I can help with in the future, feel free to contact me!

reviews.review_description: I can’t for the life of me figure out how to craft the material for the 9mm. I plugged in the machine got the blueprints picked up all of the ammo and two other things. I am completely stuck at the beginning of this, thought maybe it glitched and tried again with the same result. Can anyone help me?

developer_response.body: Hi! Craft materials must be melted. Throw the materials you've picked up into the barrel as the tutorial asks, this will give you raw material and you'll be able to craft ammo from it. If you have enough resources, pointing at the "Build" button on the bluprint and pressing the trigger will build the ammo for you. I hope I've helped and this improves your gaming experience, if not please email me (gabrealityservices@gmail.com) if you have a bug and I can help.

reviews.review_title: This game is a STEAL!! Don’t think, GET!
reviews.review_description: The voice acting is actually pretty good and feels like a survival game. You craft materials to progress through the campaign and survive the endless waves of zombies. There is some inconveniences i have to make known like there is no guidance on completing objectives. Yes, it’s a real small map but an arrow or a highlight of the object you have to interact with to complete the current objective would have saved me a ton of wondering around aimlessly. Or perhaps some reference to see what the current task is. Or else you’re just stuck and just face endless wavez of zombies and not getting anywhere. I do caution always be aware of your gun, cuz quite a few times the gun would be missing and id hsve to go in a hunt to find it. If you drop it, it doesnt automatically come back to your holster. Oh and another thing, i recommend shooting vs meleeing the zombies. No matter how great your hit is with the bat, the zombies almost always damage you even though it may not look like it. So to prevent burning through your heals, shooting them at a distance is the best approach. There’s a spot behind a metal container by the security exit gate where you can camp and shoot without worry if you ever get overwhelmed. It took me ages to find the control level for the gate (it’s behind a tan colored container next to the tent with crafting table. This is where a marker or highlight would have been really helpful.) not sure if user error but i had to quit as the lever would not move at all. Even with using both hands (controllers). Unfortunately there is no checkpoints and you start from the very beginning which was a let down. However, even with all of these inconveniences the game was enjoyable and i was impressed with how much effort was involved with its development. Highly recommend!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your detailed feedback. Chekpoint has been replaced with a respawn mechanic to eliminate the respawn caused by deaths. For tasks, there is a reference in your mobile to what the current task is. Since the core of the game, besides shooting, is to figure out what you need to do and how you need to do it to progress, I didn't think it was a good idea to take that part out of the player's hands with a guide. I will consider the possibilities for improvement, there may be improvements in the future to make the melee more effective. I have tried to be realistic about the feygver handling, so the weapon will not automatically return to its holster, but I will try to reduce the chance of mistakes. The arm jamming is strange, I haven't managed to reproduce it yet, but I'll look into it.

Thank you very much!

reviews.review_description:
Im in the map where i need to type codes in some towers. It says push menu and see codes in the quest tab. Theres no quest tab. When i push the shown button im in the home menu of my quest 3. so i cant proceed this map.
Wish there where a gun angle adjustment, you have to turn wrist down to aim.
The zombies dont make any walking sounds what really is bad because they sneek on you from behind out of nowhere.

developer_response.body:
The task list is on your phone, Brooke says you can find it on your phone. Please check there!  There haven't been any similar issues with aim so far, please contact me and I'll see if I can help, possibly in a later release. support@gabrealitygames.com
I'll look into the zombies' footsteps, it was removed for Quest 2 optimization.

Thank you for your feedback, I hope I was able to help and improve your gaming experience.

reviews.review_description: This is a good zombie game for a small developer. Very surprised by the amount of levels, and the story with voice acting. You can see that the assets are used in other games, but I liked the level lay out and the game loop. Very well done and better that other indie titles I've played at a higher price.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the review, I'm glad you like the game. In the future there will be some more graphical changes concerning the texture of the ground and the vegetation. And who knows what the future will bring. :)

reviews.review_title: So far a fun Zombie shooter
reviews.review_description:
While the game won't win best visuals, it doesn't look terrible and the gameplay itself is fun. What surprised me most tho was the quality of the voice acting which is actually really good 👍

There has only been 1 minor mistake in the game I've noticed on the first level, you have to kill the zombies before they'll realize your back but if you go around and accomplish some of your tasks the woman will congratulate you on finishing them and then still act surprised your back after you kill the zombies.

Just for clarification on visuals, I expected its partly due to needing to work on the Q2 but I actually don't mind them. They aren't bad, you'll find better on Q3 but good graphics dont always make a good game. This game is good regardless and the graphics are good just not mind blowingly good.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review! Unfortunately, the graphics are a victim of the complex game logic, so that it runs smoothly on Quest 2, and of course the track design is also a bit minimalist because of this. Thank you very much for pointing out the error in the first level; mistakes like this sometimes slip in. I'll make a note of it and fix it. :) I'm glad you like the game.

reviews.review_description:
Only played the first two levels so far, but it’s a really decent game you have to craft all your materials and survive waves of Zombies, while continuing a story and solving puzzles and hunting down materials to get through each level. 

It’s a really decent game well worth adding to your library.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the review! I hope you like the other levels in the game.

reviews.review_description: Fantastic zombie shooter with a great mix of survival, crafting, and even a few brain-tickling puzzles! :) I’ve only played a bit so far, but it’s been a blast. Can’t wait to see how it evolves in early access. Kudos to the devs — keep it coming!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review, I'm working on fixing the problems and shortcomings due to the early access nature of the game as soon as possible to make it more enjoyable.
